title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. microtulum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. microtulum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. microtulum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
